title: Incident Response Playbook
scenario: Create a simple incident response playbook for a network administrator to follow in case of a suspected security breach. The playbook should include a brief overview of the incident response process, key roles and responsibilities, and a step-by-step guide for containing and eradicating the threat. The playbook should be concise and not exceed 200 words.
constraints: Must not contain any technical jargon

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated playbook meets all the constraints.
Evaluate the tone of the playbook to ensure it is clear and concise.
Verify that the information provided is accurate and up-to-date.
